name: Barbell Bench Press
pro_tips: Keep your feet flat on the floor.
Retract your scapula and lock your shoulders back.
Control the descent to your mid-chest.

steps.description: Focus on bar path and shoulder retraction.
Explosive concentric phase.
Acclimatize to load without fatigue.
Single feeler rep to prepare CNS.

name: Dumbbell Incline Bench Press
pro_tips: Set the incline angle to 30 degrees to minimize anterior deltoid dominance.
Press up and slightly inward without clanking the weights.

steps.description: Establish deep stretch at the bottom.
Build stability and joint tracking.

name: Cable Crossover
pro_tips: Maintain a slight bend in your elbows throughout.
Squeeze the handles together at the peak contraction like hugging a tree.

steps.description: Pump blood into target fibers.

name: Barbell Conventional Deadlift
pro_tips: Keep the bar scraping your shins.
Brace your core using the Valsalva maneuver.
Drive through the floor with your heels.

steps.description: Hinge mechanics check.
Engage lats and set hips back.
Crisp lockouts.
CNS priming.

name: Lat Pulldown
pro_tips: Pull down to your upper chest.
Drive down with your elbows, not your hands.
Avoid leaning back excessively.

steps.description: Focus on full overhead stretch.
Controlled eccentric tempo.

name: Barbell Back Squat
pro_tips: Break at hips and knees simultaneously.
Keep knees tracking over toes.
Maintain a neutral spine under load.

steps.description: Open up hip flexors and ankles.
Achieve full depth below parallel.
Stay tight at the hole.
Heavy load walkout and single rep.

name: Dumbbell Overhead Press
pro_tips: Do not flare elbows out fully; keep them in the scapular plane.
Press all the way to lockout without hyperextending lower back.

steps.description: Warm shoulder girdles.
Set core stability.

name: Dumbbell Bicep Curl
pro_tips: Keep elbows pinned to your sides.
Supinate your wrists at the top of the movement for maximum peak contraction.

steps.description: Lubricate elbow joints.

name: Hanging Knee Raise
pro_tips: Avoid swinging your torso.
Initiate the movement by tilting the pelvis upward, not just lifting thighs.

name: Arm Circles
pro_tips: Start with small circles, gradually increasing radius.
Keep torso fixed to ensure motion stays isolation within shoulders.

steps.description: 10 circles forward, 10 circles backward.

name: World's Greatest Stretch
pro_tips: Rotate through the upper back, keeping your base hip locked straight.
Exhale deeply as you reach upward.

steps.description: Perform 6 dynamic iterations per side slowly.

name: Barbell Incline Variant 11
pro_tips: Keep structural alignment and focus directly on loading the Upper Pectoralis Major.
Maintain tight control during the eccentric phase to ensure full physical adaptation.

steps.description: Targeting metabolic preparation in Upper Pectoralis Major.
Prepare neural pathing for optimal weight load.
